title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: local LLM runner with a built-in model library (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, …) and a simple CLI/API.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client for the Ollama API; install via pip install ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; published on npm as ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use Ollama models as LLMs, embedders, or tool callers.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; runs in Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama (Android & desktop) with Kotlin extensions.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS-Code extension that turns Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive TUI (Rust) for browsing, pulling and chatting with models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-model-librarian
summary: CLI utility to bulk-convert Hugging-Face models into Ollama Modelfile format.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats or generates images via Ollama back-end.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin for private AI autocomplete & summarization using Ollama.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing reproducible builds of Ollama and common models.

title: ollama-gpt-script
summary: GPT-Script engine adapter that lets you call Ollama models as if they were OpenAI functions.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Go service that bridges Ollama to Slack threads with rate-limiting.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app adding Ollama chat & embedding endpoints with admin UI.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve deployment example for scaling Ollama inference across GPU nodes.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration node letting you use Ollama models in RAG pipelines.

title: reddit/r/ollama - Weekly model discussion
summary: Active community thread comparing量化 variants, performance tips and new model requests.
